meaning: n.奎宁,奎宁化合物(如里硫酸奎宁)
examples: The region began to use quinine successfully as a prophylactic.
Despite his best efforts, however, he did not end up with quinine.
At the time, quinine was the only viable medical treatment for malaria.
Instead of sweets or money, children begged for quinine, a medicine used to treat malaria.
The 75-year-old woman from Skegness admitted leaving quinine tablets within reach of the one-year-old girl.
